PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-18-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Caroline Hinshaw for petitioner.

Ms. Hinshaw state that she had not seen the December will until March, that she had concerns about the language that Mr. Benson signed the document with an X, that proofs of subscribing witness for the March will were filed on June 3rd and June 18th and that the March proof incorporates the December document. The petition for probate of will and for letters testamentary was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-24-2014 Continued To Jul-15-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
